title: bypilot tasks.json
description: Schema for docs/sprint-<N>/tasks.json — extended with DAG fields, scope routing, test depth.

sprint.description: Sprint identifier matching the parent folder name, e.g. '3' or '4-customer-mode'.

id.description: Lowercase, hyphenated. Unique across the sprint.

scope.description: Drives which implementer agent handles the task.

testDepth.description: smoke: 1 happy-path test. happy-path: 3-5 main flow scenarios. comprehensive: 5+ including edge/error/persistence. none: docs/refactor only.

estCost.description: Token/effort hint. XS<2k, S<10k, M<30k, L<80k, XL=human gate likely.

dependsOn.description: Hard deps. This task's status cannot leave 'pending' until every listed task is 'done'.

conflictsWith.description: Soft deps. These tasks cannot run in parallel with this one (file overlap, port conflict, etc.). Auto-detected from 'files' overlap unless explicit.

softDependsOn.description: Preferable order, but not required. Wave-picker uses this for ordering hint when both are ready.

acceptance.description: Testable acceptance criteria. Each line is a Given/When/Then or check item.

files.description: Hint for the implementer + auto file-overlap conflict detection.

testSpec.description: Optional path to the e2e or vitest spec file expected from this task.

branch.description: Suggested branch name. Defaults to task-<id>.

context.description: Free-form key/value of helpful file references to seed the implementer.

prerequisitesNeeded.description: Specific keys/access needed. If missing in .bypilot/setup.json, task is auto-blocked.

linksRequirement.description: REQ ids from docs/sprint-<N>/requirements.json that this task contributes to. Populated by task-composer at plan time. Used by requirements-verifier to map done-task summaries back to user requirements (PASS/FAIL gate).

creates.description: Living Contract artifacts this task is responsible for AUTHORING. The first commit must produce these files; sibling tasks subscribe to them.

contract.description: Relative path to a contract file the implementer must write. Convention: 'contracts/<component>.contract.ts' or '.contract.md'. Contract file declares public surface area (exports, props, accepted features) of a component the implementer is creating.

contractExports.description: Logical capabilities the contract must declare. Sibling tasks will check these. Example: ['allowsFile', 'allowsAudio', 'allowsImage'] for a chat composer contract.

subscribes.description: Paths of contract files this task DEPENDS ON being current. context-broker injects the latest content of each into the implementer prompt at spawn time, and the conductor re-injects via Mailbox-style ContractChanged events when a sibling commits a change.

mustIntegrate.description: Free-text instruction describing how this task must wire into a subscribed contract. Read literally by the implementer. Example: 'Set allowsAudio=true in pilot-composer.contract.ts AND wire the AudioRecordButton into the composer's button row.'

affects.description: Semantic feature tags this task touches. Used by SID-judge to detect cross-task drift (two tasks with overlapping affects must show consistent integration). Examples: 'audio-recording', 'file-upload', 'image-generation', 'rls-policy'. Free-form but conventional within a sprint.

integratedWith.description: REPORTED BY the implementer in its completion JSON. Lists which subscribed contracts / affects-siblings this task actually wired up. If affects has tags but integratedWith is empty after the task finishes, sprint-driver auto-blocks it pending review.

linearIssueId.description: Linear issue identifier (e.g., BYP-29). Set by linear-broker on mirror-up, or carried in from plan-time import. Sprint-driver uses this to drive status transitions and comments.

linearUrl.description: Direct link to the Linear issue. Convenience field, not load-bearing.

linearStatus.description: Last-known Linear state name (cache). linear-broker may update; not authoritative — Linear is source for status on its side.

linearLabels.description: Linear label names applied to the mirrored issue.

smokeUrl.description: Optional URL for Playwright MCP live smoke. test-runner navigates here if integrations.playwrightMcp.enabled and frontend-touched.
